title: astragalus laetus
intro: Astragalus laetus, also known as the desert milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. Astragalus laetus is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, providing health benefits such as reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and enhancing cardiovascular health. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and can also be found in herbal supplements and tinctures.
